overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks from a dark neon-lit alley through an underpass beneath elevated highways, crosses a wet street with other pedestrians, and continues along a sidewalk lined with vending machines. The scene features overcast night atmosphere with heavy neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back alley with closed storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow dark alley illuminated by green neon lights

entered.detail: closed corrugated metal shutters covering storefronts
green neon tube lights casting glow on alley walls
square concrete paving tiles with scattered trash
discarded cardboard box sitting against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed alleyway at night. Green neon lighting illuminates the left wall while closed metal shutters line the right. The camera moves forward over concrete tiles littered with debris, heading toward a distant light at the alley's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath elevated highway interchange

events.description: exits narrow alley into wide open area beneath massive elevated highway structure
ambient light increases significantly as camera emerges from dark passage into lit urban space

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open street area under the highway overpass, approaching the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning overhead with orange accent lighting
large cylindrical support pillars for the elevated highway
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting street lights and neon

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark alley into a vast open space beneath a multi-level highway interchange. Massive concrete pillars support the overhead roads while digital billboards glow in the distance. The ground transitions from tiles to wet asphalt, reflecting the mixed lighting of street lamps and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with illuminated crosswalk

events.description: arrives at crosswalk and waits for signal, red WAIT X WAIT visible on ground
crosswalk signal changes to green WALK X WALK and begins crossing with other pedestrians
completes crossing and turns right onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the wide street with a group of pedestrians, following the illuminated walk signals

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business suit walking alongside camera across the street
pedestrian in jacket and jeans crossing ahead of camera

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with illuminated ground signs
tall pole with traffic signals and digital pedestrian displays
futuristic cars and taxis driving on the wet multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a futuristic intersection with an illuminated crosswalk. After waiting for the signal to change from WAIT to WALK, the player crosses the wide street alongside other pedestrians. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt as the camera follows the yellow crosswalk stripes to the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with vending machines under highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing bright purple vending machines and storefronts under the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending machines with glowing interfaces
modern glass and concrete building exterior with large windows

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera continues along a covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. Bright purple vending machines line the right side against a modern glass building facade. The highway structure now dominates the left side overhead as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, one carrying an umbrella.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into the expansive, rain-slicked infrastructure of a futuristic city. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor of green neon and metal shutters, pushing forward over debris-strewn tiles toward a distant light. As the camera emerges from the alley, the space opens into a vast underpass beneath a multi-level highway interchange, where the ground shifts to wet asphalt reflecting the glow of massive concrete pillars and digital billboards. The scene then transitions to a wide intersection, following the yellow stripes of a crosswalk as the camera moves alongside other pedestrians and passing futuristic vehicles. Finally, the path leads onto a covered sidewalk lined with bright purple vending machines and glass facades, while the heavy overhead highway structure looms above.
